---
title: "04. 诊法、脉法与外候分辨"
subtitle: "Diagnosis, Pulse, and Diagnostic Resolution"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 4
categories: [huangdi-neijing, cultural, omega]
description: "How pulse, color,尺肤, and outer signs create an inverse problem: recovering the hidden whole-body state from sparse and noisy observables."
---

**Chapters:** 素问15-20, 素问49, 素问81, 灵枢37, 灵枢45, 灵枢49, 灵枢64, 灵枢74  
**Omega Directions:** `spectral theory`, `modular tower inverse limit`, `rate-distortion information theory`

{{< include articles/category_04_diagnosis_pulse_diagnostic_resolution.md >}}

---

[Back to Huangdi Neijing Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
